arts.ttl: Stoke City next manager live Narcis Pelach update
arts.sum: But sporting director Jon Walters and chairman John Coates have made the decision for a major change in direction just a month into the new season and a fortnight after the end of the summer transfer window. Chairman Coates added: “Steven, Mark, Chris, Peter and Elliot depart with our thanks for their efforts and with our best wishes for their future careers.

arts.ttl: Stoke City new manager latest as Narcis Pelach set for coronation
arts.sum: Narcis Pelach is in line to become new Stoke City head coach following the shock exit of Steven Schumacher. He has been headhunted as the man to replace Schumacher, who was told when he arrived at Clayton Wood yesterday morning that his time at the club was over, as well as his assistants Mark Hughes and Chris Cohen, coach Peter Cavanagh and head of performance Elliot Turner.

arts.ttl: Expert view on 'workaholic' Narcis Pelach as Stoke City close in on new head coach
arts.sum: Pelach has worked with a range of coaches from Carlos Corberan to Neil Warnock to David Wagner to Johannes Hoff Thorup. Narcis Pelach is being lined up to become the new head coach at Stoke City.

arts.ttl: Stoke City caretaker managers facing cup reunion after Steven Schumacher exit
arts.sum: Alex Morris and Ryan Shawcross are getting Stoke City ready for a Carabao Cup third round tie against Fleetwood Town following the exit of Steven Schumacher. A Stoke legend as player and captain, he returned as youth coach in the summer of 2023, initially working with the under-18s before moving up to the 21s, where he ultimately took over from Morris.

arts.ttl: Schumacher joins Stoke list of doom as ruthless Walters takes responsibility
arts.sum: Each manager had encountered different challenges but the bottom line was that none had been able to get Stoke to stick in the right half of the division, let alone sustain a push for promotion. Steven Schumacher had joined mid-way through last December with his eyes wide open, as Alex Neil had done 16 months previously and Michael O’Neill, Nathan Jones, Gary Rowett and Paul Lambert had done in the four-and-a-half before that.

arts.ttl: Narcis Pelach to Stoke City, his nickname and learning from Pep Guardiola and Neil Warnock
arts.sum: "I'm not afraid to say that (I want to be a head coach) because I always say that if I give my all and my best, then if I don't achieve, I won't feel embarrassed," said Pelach in an interview with the local Norwich press last year. "I had the chance to share some time with Pep when I was head under-23s coach at Girona and we were part of the City Football Group so I could get myself to training and to learn," he said.

arts.ttl: Stoke City identify Narcis Pelach as preferred Steven Schumacher replacement?
arts.sum: Stoke City are reportedly pushing to appoint Norwich City coach Narcis Pelach as the successor to Steven Schumacher.

arts.ttl: Stoke City sack head coach Steven Schumacher, cite 'change in direction'
arts.sum: Championship club Stoke City make the surprise decision to part ways with head coach Steven Schumacher.
